basic_details.job_title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website of NIT Tiruchirappalli. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation as per GOI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Tech in Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Petrochemical Engineering or allied branches (1st class), M.Sc. in Chemistry or allied branches (1st class), M.Tech in Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Petrochemical Engineering or allied branches (1st class)
qualification.details: B. Tech in Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Petrochemical Engineering or allied branches (1st class) or M.Sc. in Chemistry or allied branches (1st class). Desired: M.Tech in Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Petrochemical Engineering or allied branches (1st class).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
